Why Construsoft
Always nearby
Global reach with local impact. We understand your market and are always within reach to support you.
Smart customization
Our in-house developers create smart solutions tailored to local markets and industries.
Smart software
We provide software that ensures accuracy, integrates with machinery, and boosts safety.
Advance to the next level
Our highly skilled team with 25 years of experience supports you every step of the way.
About us
Here to help
At Construsoft, we believe in growing together. Our customer care is built on trust, connection, and genuine support. With deep industry knowledge and a strong local presence, we guide you through every step of your digital journey. Whether it’s answering questions, offering advice, or providing training, we’re here to make your work easier. You can always count on us to listen, think along, and find the right solutions.
Learn more

products.text:
BIM software | Construsoft
Skip to main content
BIM software
BIM SOFTWARE
Empowering construction
with digital precision
Construsoft empowers the construction industry with leading model-based software, enabling smarter work and confident building. As a trusted local partner of Trimble and others, we support the OpenBIM approach for seamless collaboration in Building Information Modeling.
Curious about the possibilities?
Explore our solutions
BIM SOFTWARE
Empowering construction with digital precision
Construsoft empowers the construction industry with leading model-based software, enabling smarter work and confident building. As a trusted local partner of Trimble and others, we support the OpenBIM approach for seamless collaboration in Building Information Modeling.
Curious about the possibilities?
Explore our solutions
Crafted specifically
for your unique needs
Design
Model any structure in any material, or a combination of materials, with precision.
Estimation
Generate accurate quantity take-offs, cost calculations, and quotations.
Planning
Automate and optimize your project planning, directly linked to the 3D model.
Fabrication
Seamlessly integrate with major production systems for efficient fabrication.
Collaboration
Share and coordinate BIM project information effortlessly across teams.
Mixed reality
Bridge the gap between digital models and the real world for enhanced visualization.
Find the solution
that fits your needs
We empower the entire construction cycle with smart software solutions designed for professionals in the industry. We believe in partnership, working closely with you to streamline processes and achieve lasting impact.Our specialists help to find the best solution, supporting you through implementation, customization, and long-term optimization. Curious how we can support your business? Connect with a local office for expert advice in your own language.
Find an office near you
Our software
Opening doors to a digital construction world.
Tekla Structures
Streamline construction workflows, reduce errors, and improve efficiency with precise, data-rich 3D models.
Trimble Connect
Connect teams and data for smarter, more efficient project collaboration.
Trimble Connect Extensions
Custom extensions, offering extra features tailored to industry needs and daily workflows.
SketchUp Pro
User-friendly 3D modeling for fast and clear presentations.
Buildsoft
Easy-to-use structural analysis software that helps to design and analyze structures quickly and accurately.
Tekla Structural Designer
Helps you quickly model, analyze, and design steel and concrete structures in one seamless workflow.
Consteel
Intelligent software solutions for designing steel, composite and RC structures.
IDEA StatiCa
Engineering software dedicated to structural design and code-check of joints, cross sections, beams and other details.
STRUMIS
All-in-one management and production system that helps steel fabricators by seamlessly connecting project data and resources
